nasb.text: Their relatives in their villages were to come in every seven days from time to time to be with them;

esv.text: And their kinsmen who were in their villages were obligated to come in every seven days, in turn, to be with these,

cnv.text: 他們的親族，就是住在他們村莊裡的，每七天就要來和他們換班。

ccb.text: 他们村庄的同族弟兄每隔七天就来换班。
